messages.content: List the names of products with a price above 100.
SELECT name FROM products WHERE price > 100;

gold_sql: SELECT name FROM products WHERE price > 100;

messages.content: Show the total revenue of all delivered orders.
SELECT SUM(total) FROM orders WHERE status = 'delivered';

gold_sql: SELECT SUM(total) FROM orders WHERE status = 'delivered';

messages.content: List each order id and the customer name who placed it.
SELECT o.id, c.name FROM orders o JOIN customers c ON c.id = o.customer_id;

gold_sql: SELECT o.id, c.name FROM orders o JOIN customers c ON c.id = o.customer_id;

messages.content: How many orders per status are there?
SELECT status, COUNT(*) FROM orders GROUP BY status;

gold_sql: SELECT status, COUNT(*) FROM orders GROUP BY status;
